title: cytisus pilosus
intro: Cytisus pilosus, also known as Spanish broom, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Cytisus pilosus is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
